h84282d72g57ffg40bega3dbgb952f7eacd7b: Those druids were hypocrites, all. They first offer shelter, then summon the storm.
h6808ce1eg13f2g44b5g99f0g7ec69ddcbf0f: They were protecting their home. You can't blame them for that.
h845cc3aag494dg4590g82f6g6c5b0b1a0b49: They faced no threat to their home, save the goblin horde that assailed it.
h4f12f2bag78c4g4b4ag9946g54b99131d44d: Were they so concerned for their safety, they would not have bared their fangs at us.
h4eab5e9cgb6ddg4b9agb37bga891dee14485: They sought trouble. Violence was certain.
hc452b226g8c41g44d1g988fg539727c74b93: Yes. They bared their fangs, then cried foul when we refused to grovel.
h5fc81342g4d5dg488fgb4a6gdcf407e2cd8c: The so-called benevolent preach peace only when they gain nothing from its breaking.
he1228107gc9b8g4f7fg812fg4ef12215df0b: How quick they are to abandon their ideals when their comforts are threatened.
hac090cddg6cbcg4861g9dacgec05f48dd42e: Shame we couldn't broker some peace between them.
hf0c5acbfgbc9ag458ag969bg18d44d200730: Diplomacy functions only when the parties bargain in good faith.
hc6d090f8gee05g4d15gb98dg1c03c9160807: Which is why its failure is so inevitable.
h8c9cde78gce6cg4906g8caegb116f8ded6ed: I expect better of the Treefather's disciples. The circle betrayed his teachings.
